_note: vol-02 전체 영어화 (89패널, 소스 정합 검증용 ko=원문 보존). 황금 낫의 시대 — 크로노스.

sentences.text: Spring, in Gimje. The day of the museum field trip.
sentences.ko: 봄, 김제. 박물관 견학 가는 날.

sentences.text: Hara, did you hear? A new relic just arrived at the museum!
sentences.ko: 친구: 하라야, 들었어? 박물관에 새 유물이 들어왔대!
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Yeah — golden grains from the Baekje kingdom. The sign says they were made to pray for a good harvest.
sentences.ko: 하라: 응, 백제 황금 곡식알. 풍년 비느라 만들었다고 적혀 있더라.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Gold? Is it real gold?
sentences.ko: 친구: 황금? 진짜 금이야?
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: They're models, but they're covered in real gold leaf. From 1,500 years ago.
sentences.ko: 하라: 모형이긴 한데, 진짜 금박을 입혔대. 1500년 전 거.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Whoa, that's way older than even my grandma!
sentences.ko: 친구: 우와, 우리 할머니보다 한참 위네!
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Golden grains the Baekje people shaped 1,500 years ago, praying for a rich harvest.
sentences.ko: 1500년 전 백제 사람들이 풍년을 빌며 만든 황금 곡식알.

sentences.text: All right, everyone. Take a good look inside this case.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 자, 여러분. 이 진열장 안을 잘 보세요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: These are golden grains the Baekje people molded while praying for a good harvest.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 백제 사람들이 풍년을 빌며 빚은 황금 곡식알이에요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Ms. Kim, the barley, the millet, and the rice all look different!
sentences.ko: 친구: 선생님, 보리랑 기장이랑 쌀이 다 다르게 생겼어요!
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Well spotted. Each grain was shaped to match its real form.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 잘 봤어요. 곡식마다 모양을 살려 빚었지요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: The color is so warm…
sentences.ko: 하라: 빛깔이 정말 따뜻하다…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Does anyone know why gold is so special?
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 황금이 왜 특별한지 아는 사람?
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Because it's expensive!
sentences.ko: 친구: 비싸서요!
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: That's true too, but there's a bigger reason.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 그것도 맞지만, 더 큰 이유가 있어요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Gold never changes. Even after 1,500 years, it still shines just as it first did.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 황금은 변하지 않아요. 1500년이 지나도 처음 빛 그대로지요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Ah, so that's why people long ago saw it as a symbol of eternity.
sentences.ko: 하라: 아, 그래서 옛 어른들이 영원의 상징으로 여겼군요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Exactly, Hara. They poured their wish for an everlasting harvest into it.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 맞아요, 하라. 풍년이 영원하길 비는 마음을 담은 거예요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Huh? The Byeokgolje Farming Culture Museum…
sentences.ko: 하라: 어? 벽골제 농경문화박물관…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The golden grains… have lost their color?
sentences.ko: 하라: 황금 곡식알이… 변색됐다고?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: They were clearly shining yesterday — in just one night?
sentences.ko: 하라: 어제 분명 빛났는데, 하룻밤 만에?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Gold was supposed to last forever. So why…
sentences.ko: 하라: 영원하다던 황금이 왜…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: It's Hara. How did you know to come?
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 하라구나. 어떻게 알고 왔니?
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Ms. Kim, I saw the newspaper and rushed over. Is it really true?
sentences.ko: 하라: 선생님, 신문 보고 달려왔어요. 정말이에요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yesterday it was clearly gold, but today it looks like this.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 어제는 분명 황금이었는데, 오늘은 이 모양이에요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: The conservation team has been studying it since dawn, but once again they can't find the cause.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 보존팀이 새벽부터 살펴봤지만, 이번에도 원인을 모른대요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: A symbol of eternity, losing its light…
sentences.ko: 하라: 영원의 상징이 빛을 잃다니…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: What's happened in the myths this time?
sentences.ko: 하라: 신화에서 또 무슨 일이 벌어진 거야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Grandpa, you said Mount Moak has another old story, didn't you?
sentences.ko: 하라: 할아버지, 모악산에 옛이야기가 또 있다고 하셨죠?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's right, my own grandma used to tell it. The legend of the Age of the Golden Sickle.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 그려, 우리 할매가 들려주셨제. '황금 낫의 시대' 전설 말이여.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: The golden sickle?
sentences.ko: 하라: 황금 낫이요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Long ago the grain ripened all on its own, but the darkness swung a sickle and locked the harvest away.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 옛적에는 곡식이 절로 익었는디, 어둠이 낫을 휘둘러 곡식을 가두어 갔다고 혀.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: They also said that when the golden light fades, Mount Moak calls for someone.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 황금빛이 사라지면 모악산이 사람을 부른다고도 했제.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: Then the grains losing their light is also…
sentences.ko: 하라: 그럼 곡식알이 빛을 잃은 것도…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That evening, Hara climbed Mount Moak once more.
sentences.ko: 그날 저녁, 하라는 다시 모악산을 올랐다.

sentences.text: This definitely isn't the cave from last time. It's on the opposite side of the mountain.
sentences.ko: 하라: 분명 지난번 동굴이 아니야. 산자락 반대편이잖아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The fog is thicker too… and a golden light is leaking out from inside.
sentences.ko: 하라: 안개도 더 짙고… 안에서 황금빛이 새 나와.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The pen in my bag is still asleep… and Iri's nowhere to be seen either.
sentences.ko: 하라: 가방 속 펜은 아직 잠들어 있고… 이리도 안 보이고.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Where is it trying to take me this time?
sentences.ko: 하라: 이번엔 나를 어디로 데려가려는 거지?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The golden sickle was calling for Hara.
sentences.ko: 황금 낫이 하라를 부르고 있었다.

sentences.text: That… that thing floating inside… is it a sickle?
sentences.ko: 하라: 저… 저 안에 떠 있는 게… 낫?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Ha…ra… you woke me…
sentences.ko: 펜: 하라…야… 깨어났구나…
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen! You've opened your eyes again?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜! 다시 눈을 떴어?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: My heart's pounding! Here we go again, Hara!
sentences.ko: 이리: 두근두근! 또 시작이야, 하라야!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: This time we must go to the Age of the Golden Sickle. Before the darkness reaps the grain.
sentences.ko: 펜: 이번엔 황금 낫의 시대로 가야 한다. 어둠이 곡식을 거두기 전에.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Mmm… who's waking me again?
sentences.ko: 펜: 으음… 누가 또 나를 깨우는 거지?
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Oh? This light… it looks familiar.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어라, 이 빛… 낯이 익은걸.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen! Wake up, hurry!
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜! 일어나, 어서!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: A blue light is leaking out of my bag. Is this the start again?
sentences.ko: 하라: 가방에서 푸른빛이 새 나와. 이번에도 시작인 거야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: A new cave, is it. Every drop of my ink is trembling.
sentences.ko: 펜: 새 동굴이라. 잉크 한 방울이 떨려 오는걸.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Look, Hara. The next page is calling out all by itself.
sentences.ko: 펜: 봐라, 하라. 다음 페이지가 스스로 부르고 있구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Right where we left off last time, the story is still flowing on without stopping.
sentences.ko: 펜: 지난번 우리가 떠나온 그 자리에서, 이야기가 멈추지 않고 흐르고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The book is fluttering on its own! It's like the paper is alive.
sentences.ko: 하라: 책이 저절로 펄럭여! 종이가 살아 있는 것 같아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Myths are always like that. Just when you think they've ended, they turn the page again.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화는 늘 그렇단다. 끝난 줄 알았는데, 다시 페이지를 넘기지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: This time… we must go to the Age of Cronus.
sentences.ko: 펜: 이번엔… 크로노스의 시대로 가야 한단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The shadow of the golden sickle is carved upon the page. A new king has risen.
sentences.ko: 펜: 황금 낫의 그림자가 페이지 위에 새겨졌어. 새 왕이 일어선 거야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: So there's a dark secret hidden there, right?
sentences.ko: 하라: 어두운 비밀이 숨어 있는 거지?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The shadow stretches long, all the way up over the throne.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그림자가 옥좌 위까지 길게 늘어졌어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes. We must see with our own eyes how a promise turns into darkness.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래. 약속이 어떻게 어둠으로 변하는지, 우리 두 눈으로 봐야 해.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The rainbow road opened once again.
sentences.ko: 무지개 길이 다시 열렸다.

sentences.text: Hey~ we meet again! Which age shall we roll off to this time?
sentences.ko: 이리: 야~ 우리 또 만났네! 이번엔 어느 시대로 굴러가 볼까?
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The caduceus is glowing twice as bright as usual.
sentences.ko: 이리: 카두케우스가 평소보다 두 배는 환하다고.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Iri! I really missed you!
sentences.ko: 하라: 이리야! 정말 보고 싶었어!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: I waited so long after Volume One ended.
sentences.ko: 하라: 1권 끝나고 한참을 기다렸단 말이야.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Me too, me too! This time I'll get you there even faster.
sentences.ko: 이리: 나도, 나도! 이번엔 더 빠르게 데려다 줄게.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Let's record the truth of the myth, without leaving out a single line.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화의 진실을, 한 줄도 빠뜨리지 않고 기록하자.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: And let's be sure to return the golden grains of Gimje's fields to their place.
sentences.ko: 이리: 김제 들판의 황금 곡식알도, 꼭 제자리에 돌려놓자.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Let the three of us stop the darkness from locking the light away.
sentences.ko: 하라: 어둠이 빛을 가두지 못하게, 우리 셋이 막아 내자.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The light of our promise is blooming bright between our palms.
sentences.ko: 펜: 약속의 빛이 손바닥 사이에서 환하게 피어나는구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Huh? This time the rainbow's colors are different from Volume One.
sentences.ko: 하라: 어? 이번엔 무지개 색이 1권하고 달라.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The gold looks much deeper than the red and orange.
sentences.ko: 하라: 빨강·주황보다 황금이 훨씬 진해 보여.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Good eye. That's the color of the Age of Cronus.
sentences.ko: 이리: 잘 봤네. 크로노스 시대의 색이거든.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Gold is the theme of this age, so the road is dyed in that color too.
sentences.ko: 이리: 황금이 이 시대의 주제니까, 길도 그 색으로 물든 거야.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The color of the road shows the heart of the age.
sentences.ko: 펜: 길의 빛깔이 시대의 마음을 보여 준단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: To the Age of the Golden Sickle — the age of a new king.
sentences.ko: 황금 낫의 시대, 새 왕의 시대로.

sentences.text: Look — that is a piece of Uranus's cloak.
sentences.ko: 펜: 보아라, 저것이 우라노스의 망토 조각이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The scattered starlight stayed behind, just as it was, and became the constellations.
sentences.ko: 펜: 흩날린 별빛이 그대로 별자리로 남았지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: So even when Uranus is gone, the stars remain forever.
sentences.ko: 하라: 우라노스가 사라져도, 별은 영영 남는 거구나.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: All the constellations I saw in the night sky came from right here.
sentences.ko: 하라: 밤하늘에서 봤던 별자리가 다 여기서 온 거였어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes. A myth may seem to vanish, but somewhere it always remains as a single line of light.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래. 신화는 사라지는 듯해도, 어딘가 한 줄 빛으로 남는 법이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: All right, we're almost there. Up ahead is the throne of Cronus.
sentences.ko: 이리: 자, 거의 다 왔어. 저 앞이 크로노스의 옥좌야.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: From here on, let's be careful even with our footsteps.
sentences.ko: 이리: 여기부턴 발소리도 조심하자.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The light of the road is fading. Let's calm our hearts along with it.
sentences.ko: 펜: 길의 빛이 점점 가라앉고 있어. 우리 마음도 같이 가라앉히자.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: My heart is pounding. But I won't stop.
sentences.ko: 하라: 가슴이 두근거려. 하지만 멈추지 않을 거야.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: There, an age was unfolding in which a promise turns into darkness.
sentences.ko: 그곳에는, 약속이 어둠으로 변하는 시대가 펼쳐져 있었다.

sentences.text: Pen, that person… is that Cronus?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 저 사람… 저게 크로노스야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes, Hara. The youngest child of Volume One has, over time, become the new king.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래, 하라. 1권의 어린 막내가, 시간이 흘러 새 왕이 되었단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Whoa… he's grown twice as tall.
sentences.ko: 이리: 우와… 키가 두 배는 커졌네.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The golden sickle looks heavier than it did before.
sentences.ko: 하라: 황금 낫이 옛날보다 더 무거워 보여.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Cronus, once the youngest, had become the king of a new age.
sentences.ko: 막내였던 크로노스가, 새 시대의 왕이 되었다.

sentences.text: Brothers and sisters. A new age has come.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 형제자매들이여. 새 시대가 왔다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Now it is time for us to divide and govern the universe.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 이제 우리가 우주를 나누어 다스릴 때다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I will follow your will, new king.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 그대의 뜻을 따르겠소, 새 왕이여.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: The boundaries of each domain must be set in good order.
sentences.ko: 테미스: 영역의 경계는 질서 있게 정해져야 합니다.
sentences.speaker: Themis

sentences.text: It's the first time I've ever seen all eleven gods gathered in one place.
sentences.ko: 펜: 열한 신이 한자리에 모인 건 처음 보는 광경이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: I will take the great sea. Every river will flow into my arms.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 나는 대해를 맡겠소. 모든 강이 내 품으로 흐를 것이오.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: I will take light and the sun. Each day I will brighten a new morning.
sentences.ko: 히페리온: 나는 빛과 태양을. 매일 새 아침을 밝히리다.
sentences.speaker: Hyperion

sentences.text: I will take the wisdom of the stars. I will guard every secret of the night sky.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 나는 별의 지혜를. 밤하늘의 모든 비밀을 지키겠소.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: I will take the fate of humankind.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 나는 인간의 운명을 맡지.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: I will take the constellations. I will be a guide for those who lose their way.
sentences.ko: 크리오스: 나는 별자리를. 길 잃은 자에게 방향이 되리다.
sentences.speaker: Crius

sentences.text: The eleven Titans divided the universe among themselves, Hara.
sentences.ko: 펜: 열한 티탄이 우주를 나눠 가졌어, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Only five became well known, and the other six were shrouded in mystery.
sentences.ko: 펜: 다섯 명만 잘 알려졌고, 나머지 여섯은 비밀에 가려졌단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen, kept a secret… why is that?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 비밀이라니… 왜 그래?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: I guess even myths get forgotten if no one can remember the names.
sentences.ko: 이리: 신화도 이름 못 외우면 잊혀지나 봐.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: A record is memory itself. A forgotten god is a vanished god.
sentences.ko: 펜: 기록이 곧 기억이야. 잊혀진 신은 사라진 신이거든.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Mother, is all of this… truly peaceful?
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니, 이 모든 게… 정말 평화로운가요?
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Rhea, peace only exists when promises are kept.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 레아야, 평화는 약속이 지켜질 때만 있단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: My brother's eyes look different from how they used to.
sentences.ko: 레아: 오라버니의 눈빛이 예전과 달라 보여요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: A throne tends to change a person.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 왕좌는 사람을 바꾸곤 한단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Pen, who is that woman?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 저 여인은 누구야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's Rhea. The daughter of Gaia, and soon to be the wife of Cronus.
sentences.ko: 펜: 레아야. 가이아의 딸이자, 곧 크로노스의 아내가 될 분이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Cronus. Listen to your mother's words.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스. 어미의 말을 들어다오.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Keep your promise. Set my other children free from where they are locked away.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 약속을 지켜다오. 갇혀 있는 내 다른 아이들을 풀어다오.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: …Mother.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …어머니.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: The Hecatoncheires and the Cyclopes — they are all your brothers.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 헤카톤케이레스도, 키클롭스도, 모두 네 형제란다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: My mother is right.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니의 말씀이 옳다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: A promise… must be kept.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 약속은… 지켜야 한다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: But if I set them free, this throne…
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 하지만 풀어주면, 이 왕좌는…
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: The weak get everything taken from them, Cronus.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 약하면 빼앗긴다네, 크로노스.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: Those six giants will threaten your throne.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 그 여섯 거인은 너의 왕좌를 위협할 것이오.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Once you set them free, you will never be able to lock them away again.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 한 번 풀어주면 다시 가둘 수 없을 것이야.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: By the wisdom of the stars, I tell you — now is the moment of decision.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 별의 지혜로 말하건대, 지금이 결정의 순간이오.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Mother, forgive me.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 용서하소서.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: …If that is how it is.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …그렇다면.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: This age, I shall rule!
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 이 시대는, 내가 다스린다!
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: No one shall ever shake my throne!
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 그 누구도 내 왕좌를 흔들지 못하리라!
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: …My son.
sentences.ko: 가이아: …내 아들아.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: How can you walk the very same road again?
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어찌 또 같은 길을 가려느냐.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Pen, how can a promise… change like that?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 약속이… 어떻게 저렇게 변해버려?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: There are times when fear is stronger than love, Hara.
sentences.ko: 펜: 두려움은 사랑보다 강할 때도 있단다, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The fear of losing his throne buried his mother's plea.
sentences.ko: 펜: 왕좌를 잃을까 하는 두려움이 어머니의 부탁을 덮어버린 거야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: It's a sad thing. Truly.
sentences.ko: 이리: 슬픈 일이야. 정말로.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: It's exactly like what happened with Uranus…
sentences.ko: 하라: 우라노스 때랑 똑같잖아…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The rise of a new king — let's record it like this.
sentences.ko: 펜: 새 왕의 등장, 이렇게 기록해 두자.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen, what will be written on the next page?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 다음 장에는 뭐가 적힐까?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's for Cronus to decide.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그건 크로노스가 정할 일이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Each time a line of the myth was written, the gold of Gimje glimmered a little.
sentences.ko: 신화의 한 줄이 적힐 때마다, 김제의 황금도 작게 빛났다.

sentences.text: Oh, Pen, at the edge of the book, the fields of Gimje…
sentences.ko: 하라: 어, 펜, 책 끝에 김제 들판이…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: You see it? Each time a line of the myth is written, a little light returns.
sentences.ko: 펜: 보이지? 신화의 한 줄이 적힐 때마다 작은 빛이 돌아오는구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: It's like the grains are singing again.
sentences.ko: 이리: 곡식알이 다시 노래하는 것 같아.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Cronus.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Three Cyclopes, three Hecatoncheires. Set free your mother's six children.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 키클롭스 셋, 헤카톤케이레스 셋. 어머니의 여섯 아이를 풀어다오.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Have you forgotten your promise? The vow you made the day you rose to the throne.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 약속을 잊었느냐? 네가 왕좌에 오르던 그날의 맹세를.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: …Mother.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …어머니.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: He made a promise… so why is he hesitating?
sentences.ko: 하라: 약속을 했는데… 왜 망설이는 거지?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: …My brothers lie asleep over there.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …형제들이 저기 잠들어 있다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: One has a blue light flowing from a single eye, and another keeps a hundred arms folded over his chest…
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 한 명은 외눈에서 푸른빛이 흐르고, 또 한 명은 백 개의 팔을 가슴에 묻고…
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: They are Cronus's brothers. Born of the same mother.
sentences.ko: 펜: 크로노스의 형제들이지. 같은 어머니에게서 태어났단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: But why does he hesitate to free them, Pen?
sentences.ko: 이리: 그런데 왜 풀어주기를 망설일까, 펜.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: If I free them… they are far too strong.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 풀어주면… 저들은 너무 강하다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: The one-eyed ones forge lightning, and the hundred-handed ones hurl mountains.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 외눈은 번개를 빚고, 백 손은 산을 던진다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: If that power turns against me…
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 그 힘이 나를 향하면…
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Power is the hardest thing to let go of, once it's in your grasp.
sentences.ko: 펜: 권력이란 한 번 손에 쥐면, 놓기가 가장 어려운 법이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Brother, those six are a threat to our throne.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 형, 저 여섯은 우리 왕좌의 위협이오.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: We must lock them away again. Deep, deeper still.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 다시 가둬야 하오. 깊이, 더 깊이.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: A promise… can be put off, depending on the circumstances.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 약속은… 사정에 따라 미룰 수도 있는 것이오.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Mother too will understand someday.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 어머니께서도 언젠가는 이해하실 것이오.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: …My brothers are right.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …형제들의 말이 옳다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Oh no, Pen. It looks like he's going to break his promise.
sentences.ko: 하라: 어떡해, 펜. 약속을 깰 셈인가 봐.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The moment a promise turns into darkness.
sentences.ko: 약속이, 어둠으로 변하는 순간.

sentences.text: …Brother… why…
sentences.ko: 브리아레오스: …형… 왜…
sentences.speaker: Briareos

sentences.text: He weeps even in his sleep. To think a hundred hands could gather into a single teardrop.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잠든 채로 우는구나. 백 개의 손이 한 방울의 눈물로 모이다니.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen, that giant hurts just like we do.
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 저 거인도 우리처럼 아픈 거구나.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Cronus!
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스!
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: To the one who breaks a promise, the same fate shall return!
sentences.ko: 가이아: 약속을 깬 자에게, 같은 운명이 돌아갈 것이다!
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A mother's words are never spoken in vain.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어머니의 말은, 결코 빈 바람이 아니다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Whoa, the earth is shaking… Gaia is angry.
sentences.ko: 하라: 와, 대지가 흔들려… 가이아가 화났어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Gaia's wrath. The first mother's first anger.
sentences.ko: 가이아의 분노. 첫 어머니의 첫 분노.

sentences.text: Cronus, listen well.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스, 잘 들어라.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: You too will meet the same fate at the hands of your own child!
sentences.ko: 가이아: 너도, 너의 아이에게 같은 운명을 받을 것이다!
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Just as you pushed your father aside, you too will yield your throne to your own child.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 네가 아버지를 밀어냈듯, 너 또한 네 아이의 손에 자리를 내어줄 것이다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: The prophecy of Uranus is coming back to life.
sentences.ko: 펜: 우라노스의 예언이 다시 살아나는구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The starlight is… trembling, Pen.
sentences.ko: 이리: 별빛이… 떨고 있어, 펜.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: …No.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …아니야.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I will stop it.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 나는, 막을 거야.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: No child shall ever take my place.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어떤 아이도, 내 자리를 빼앗지 못한다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Fear has begun. The darkest seed of all.
sentences.ko: 펜: 두려움이 시작되었구나. 가장 어두운 씨앗이.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Look, Hara! They are the Meliae.
sentences.ko: 펜: 보거라, 하라! 멜리아이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: They are spirits born when the starlight of Uranus's cloak touched the earth.
sentences.ko: 펜: 우라노스 망토의 별빛이 대지에 닿아 태어난 정령들이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Wow… their hair is like leaves.
sentences.ko: 하라: 와… 머리카락이 잎새 같아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: A sweet scent of trees! It's like spring, Pen.
sentences.ko: 이리: 향긋한 나무 냄새! 봄 같다, 펜.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Mother, we have come.
sentences.ko: 멜리아이: 어머니, 저희가 왔어요.
sentences.speaker: Meliae

sentences.text: Mother, do not grieve.
sentences.ko: 멜리아이 1: 어머니, 슬퍼 마세요.
sentences.speaker: Meliae 1

sentences.text: When a leaf falls, a new leaf sprouts again.
sentences.ko: 멜리아이 2: 잎새가 떨어지면, 새 잎이 또 돋아요.
sentences.speaker: Meliae 2

sentences.text: We are right here beside you.
sentences.ko: 멜리아이 3: 저희가 곁에 있어요.
sentences.speaker: Meliae 3

sentences.text: …My children.
sentences.ko: 가이아: …내 아이들아.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Gaia looks like she's smiling, just a little.
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아가 조금, 웃는 것 같아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The betrayal of a promise… the first mother's first anger….
sentences.ko: 펜: 약속의 배신… 첫 어머니의 첫 분노….
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Line by line, we must not forget.
sentences.ko: 펜: 한 줄, 한 줄, 잊지 말아야 한다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen, this story is sad.
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 이 이야기 슬퍼.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Sorrow must be recorded too, Hara. That way the next person can learn.
sentences.ko: 펜: 슬픔도 기록해야 한단다, 하라. 그래야 다음 사람이 배우지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen, Cronus is afraid too.
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 크로노스도 무서운 거야.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: He's trembling, afraid he'll end up like Uranus.
sentences.ko: 하라: 우라노스처럼 될까 봐, 떨고 있는 거잖아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's right, Hara.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그렇단다, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: That very fear calls forth an even greater darkness.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그 두려움이, 더 큰 어둠을 부른단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: If you break a promise out of fear, in the end you're the one who grows loneliest….
sentences.ko: 이리: 무섭다고 약속을 깨면, 결국 자기가 가장 외로워지는데….
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The first crack between a mother and her child.
sentences.ko: 어머니와 아이 사이의 첫 균열.

sentences.text: …I will not be shaken.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …나는 흔들리지 않는다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Cronus. You are already shaking.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스. 너는 이미, 흔들리고 있다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: The throne drew nearer, but his mother grew farther away.
sentences.ko: 펜: 옥좌는 가까워졌지만, 어머니는 멀어졌구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Brothers, listen. A new age has opened.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 형제들아, 들어라. 새 시대가 열렸다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: The golden sickle split the sky, and now we rule.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 황금 낫이 하늘을 갈랐고, 이제 우리가 다스린다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: A new age needs a new family.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 새 시대에는 새 가족이 필요하다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Brother, by those words… who do you mean to start a family with?
sentences.ko: 테미스: 형님, 그 말씀은… 누구와 가정을 이루신다는 뜻인지요.
sentences.speaker: Themis

sentences.text: My sister Rhea. With her, I shall rule this universe.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 나의 누이 레아. 그녀와 함께 이 우주를 다스릴 것이다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Pen, he's marrying his own sister?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 누이끼리 결혼한다고?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: In the very beginning it was so. It's the age of the gods, after all.
sentences.ko: 펜: 태초에는 그랬단다. 신들의 시대니까.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Where could Rhea be. By Mother's side, surely.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 레아는 어디 있을까. 어머니 곁이겠지.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Whoa, Cronus is walking through a flower field! It doesn't suit him!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와아, 크로노스가 꽃밭을 걸어! 안 어울려!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Shh, Iri. This is a serious moment.
sentences.ko: 하라: 쉿, 이리야. 진지한 순간이잖아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: It's the first proposal in the myth. Watch closely.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화의 첫 청혼이지. 잘 보아 두렴.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Sister Rhea. It's been a long time.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 누이 레아. 오랜만이구나.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Brother… what brings you all the way here.
sentences.ko: 레아: 오라버니… 무슨 일로 여기까지.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Lead the new age together by my side.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 내 옆에서 새 시대를 함께 이끌어 다오.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: You and I, let us fill this universe with warmth, the two of us.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 너와 나, 둘이서 이 우주를 따뜻하게 채우자.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Brother… this is so sudden.
sentences.ko: 레아: 오빠… 너무 갑작스러워요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Rhea's eyes are wavering…
sentences.ko: 하라: 레아 눈빛이 흔들려…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Be careful, Rhea.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 조심하렴, 레아야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Fate repeats itself. What happened to me may happen to you as well.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 운명은 반복된단다. 내가 겪은 일을 너도 겪게 될지 모른다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother… what should I do?
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니… 어떡하죠?
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Love him. But keep both your eyes open, always.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 사랑하라. 그러나 두 눈은 늘 뜨고 있으렴.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A mother's warning… this one carries a different weight.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어머니의 경고… 무게가 다르구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: I won't forget your words, Mother.
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니의 말씀, 잊지 않을 거예요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: But there is sincerity in my brother's eyes.
sentences.ko: 레아: 하지만 오라버니의 눈빛에는 진심이 있어요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: I'll choose to trust love over fear.
sentences.ko: 레아: 사랑을 두려움보다 먼저 믿어 볼래요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Rhea, I hope you'll be happy…
sentences.ko: 하라: 레아, 부디 행복하길…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The first wedding of the new age.
sentences.ko: 새 시대의 첫 결혼.

sentences.text: Rhea, take my hand.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 레아, 내 손을 잡아라.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Brother, let us be together forever.
sentences.ko: 레아: 오라버니, 영원히 함께해요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: We celebrate the new age!
sentences.ko: 티탄들: 새 시대를 축하하노라!
sentences.speaker: Titans

sentences.text: Look, Hara. A new star is being born.
sentences.ko: 펜: 보아라, 하라야. 별이 새로 태어난다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Wow… so a wedding can change the universe.
sentences.ko: 하라: 와아… 결혼식이 우주를 바꾸는 거구나.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Who gets to name that star? I want to name it!
sentences.ko: 이리: 저 별 이름은 누가 지어 줘? 내가 지을래!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: That's a story for much later on.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그건 훨씬 뒤의 이야기란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: This is the most peaceful night I've ever known.
sentences.ko: 레아: 이렇게 평온한 밤은 처음이에요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Mother, I've decided to believe in love.
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니, 저는 사랑을 믿어 보기로 했어요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: It's so warm… I wish it could stay like this.
sentences.ko: 하라: 너무 따뜻해… 이대로면 좋을 텐데.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The prophecy of Uranus awoke once more.
sentences.ko: 우라노스의 예언이, 다시 깨어났다.

sentences.text: Hara, that starlight… it's Uranus's cloak.
sentences.ko: 펜: 하라야, 저 별빛… 우라노스의 망토다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: How does the power of the one who locked them away reach all the way here…
sentences.ko: 하라: 가둔 분의 기운이 어떻게 여기까지…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: I'm scared… the stars are moving like letters.
sentences.ko: 이리: 무서워… 별이 글자처럼 움직여.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: That night, Cronus was haunted by a terrible dream.
sentences.ko: 그날 밤, 크로노스는 무서운 꿈에 사로잡혔다.

sentences.text: A dream… was it a dream?
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 꿈… 꿈이었나.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: No. It was far too vivid.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 아니다. 너무도 또렷했다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: No… is that really going to happen to me too?
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 안 돼… 그 일이 내게도 일어난단 말이냐.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Brother… what's wrong…
sentences.ko: 레아: 오라버니… 무슨 일…
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: It's nothing. Sleep a while longer.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 아무 일도 아니다. 더 자거라.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: If the prophecy is real, there is only one way to stop it.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 예언이 진짜라면, 막을 길은 하나뿐.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: The moment a child is born, I shall put them into a deep sleep at once.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 아이가 태어나면, 곧바로 잠재워 두리라.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I will let no one take this throne from me.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 누구에게도 빼앗기지 않겠다. 이 왕좌를.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Cronus's eyes have… gone dark.
sentences.ko: 하라: 크로노스의 눈빛이… 어두워졌어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Fear has begun. The most fearsome enemy of all.
sentences.ko: 펜: 두려움이 시작되었다. 가장 무서운 적이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: A dark promise, unknown to the loving mother.
sentences.ko: 사랑하는 어머니가 모르는, 어두운 약속.

sentences.text: Rhea, I'm sorry.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 레아야, 미안하다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: It's a promise I can never tell you about.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 너에게는 절대 말하지 못할 약속이구나.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Pen, a wall has risen between the two of them…
sentences.ko: 이리: 펜, 둘 사이에 벽이 생겼어…
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Yes. A secret is the quickest thing to gnaw away at love.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래. 비밀은 사랑을 가장 빨리 갉아먹는 법이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Now, I open a new chapter. Its title is "Prophecy and Fear."
sentences.ko: 펜: 자, 새 장을 연다. 제목은 "예언과 두려움".
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen, the letters are carving themselves…
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 글씨가 저절로 새겨져…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: A myth records its own path.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화는 스스로 자기 길을 기록하지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: This chapter… smells of sorrow.
sentences.ko: 이리: 이 장… 슬픈 냄새가 나.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: So that's how… it comes to happen.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그래서… 그 일이 일어나는 거야.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Cronus, to his own child…
sentences.ko: 하라: 크로노스가 자기 아이를…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes. Fear made him forget even a mother's love.
sentences.ko: 펜: 응. 두려움이 어머니의 사랑마저 잊게 했어.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Is there no way to stop it, Pen?
sentences.ko: 하라: 막을 수는 없는 걸까, 펜.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The path of a myth is already set. We can only watch.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화의 길은 정해져 있단다. 우리는 지켜볼 뿐이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Still… it's so sad.
sentences.ko: 이리: 그래도… 너무 슬퍼.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: This is our first baby. Her name is Hestia.
sentences.ko: 레아: 우리 첫 아기야. 이름은 헤스티아.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Her tiny fingers are so warm.
sentences.ko: 레아: 작은 손가락이 이렇게 따뜻하구나.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Waah…
sentences.ko: 헤스티아: 응애….
sentences.speaker: Hestia

sentences.text: There, there, Mommy's right here.
sentences.ko: 레아: 그래, 엄마가 여기 있어.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Wow… a newborn baby is so small.
sentences.ko: 하라: 와… 갓 태어난 아기가 저렇게 작아요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: I will take that child away.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 그 아이는 내가 데려가겠소.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I will raise it myself.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 내가 직접 키울 것이오.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Husband… what do you mean?
sentences.ko: 레아: 여보… 무슨 말씀이세요?
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: This is the baby I only just held….
sentences.ko: 레아: 이제 막 안아본 아기인데….
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Do not ask. This is my decision.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 묻지 마시오. 이건 내 결정이오.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Waaah….
sentences.ko: 헤스티아: 으앙….
sentences.speaker: Hestia

sentences.text: The one who forgot his promise put the child into a deep sleep and locked her away.
sentences.ko: 약속을 잊은 자가, 아이를 잠재워 가두었다.

sentences.text: Mother… our baby is gone.
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니… 우리 아기가 사라졌어요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: They say she has fallen into a deep sleep and cannot wake.
sentences.ko: 레아: 깊은 잠에 들어 깨어나지 못한대요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Rhea, don't cry — rest here in my arms.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 레아야, 울지 말고 내 품에 기대렴.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: This fate is far too heavy….
sentences.ko: 가이아: 운명이 너무 무겁구나….
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, what am I to do?
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니, 저는 어떻게 해야 하죠?
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: How a mother's heart must ache….
sentences.ko: 하라: 어머니 마음이 얼마나 아프실까….
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The second child, Demeter, met the same fate.
sentences.ko: 두 번째 아이, 데메테르도 같은 운명.

sentences.text: Our second baby. Demeter.
sentences.ko: 레아: 둘째 아기야. 데메테르.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Waah….
sentences.ko: 데메테르: 응애….
sentences.speaker: Demeter

sentences.text: This time, please let her stay by my side.
sentences.ko: 레아: 이번엔 부디 곁에 있게 해주세요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: I will take that child away as well.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 그 아이도 내가 데려가겠소.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Husband, please, just this once….
sentences.ko: 레아: 여보, 제발 한 번만….
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Not again…? How could he do this?
sentences.ko: 하라: 또…? 어떻게 그럴 수가 있어요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The third, Hera, too.
sentences.ko: 셋째, 헤라도.

sentences.text: This is our third baby. Her name is Hera.
sentences.ko: 레아: 셋째 아기란다. 이름은 헤라.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Waah….
sentences.ko: 헤라: 응애….
sentences.speaker: Hera

sentences.text: You at least… I want to keep you by my side.
sentences.ko: 레아: 너만은… 너만은 곁에 두고 싶구나.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: I will take this child too.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 이 아이도 내가 맡겠소.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Husband, my heart is breaking.
sentences.ko: 레아: 여보, 제 마음이 무너져요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: The mother's tears have fallen again….
sentences.ko: 이리: 어머니의 눈물이 또 떨어졌어….
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The fourth, Hades, too.
sentences.ko: 넷째, 하데스도.

sentences.text: Our fourth. Hades.
sentences.ko: 레아: 넷째구나. 하데스.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Waaah….
sentences.ko: 하데스: 으앙….
sentences.speaker: Hades

sentences.text: I wanted to look into his little eyes just once more….
sentences.ko: 레아: 작은 눈을 한 번이라도 더 보고 싶었는데….
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: I will take that child away as well.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 그 아이도 내가 데려가겠소.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Husband, why on earth….
sentences.ko: 레아: 여보, 도대체 왜….
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Tragedy repeats itself in the very same way.
sentences.ko: 펜: 비극이 같은 모양으로 거듭되는구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The fifth, Poseidon, met the same fate.
sentences.ko: 다섯째, 포세이돈도 같은 운명.

sentences.text: Our fifth baby. Poseidon.
sentences.ko: 레아: 다섯째 아기야. 포세이돈.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Waah….
sentences.ko: 포세이돈: 응애….
sentences.speaker: Poseidon

sentences.text: The fifth one… the fifth….
sentences.ko: 레아: 다섯 번째구나… 다섯 번째….
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: This child is the same as the rest.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 이 아이도 같다오.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Husband, my heart feels completely empty.
sentences.ko: 레아: 여보, 제 가슴이 다 비어버렸어요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: How could this happen five times over….
sentences.ko: 하라: 어떻게 이런 일이 다섯 번이나….
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Five children were locked in a magical sleep, waiting for the day they would wake.
sentences.ko: 다섯 아이가, 마법의 잠 속에 갇혔다. 깨어날 날을 기다리며.

sentences.text: Mother, how am I supposed to go on living?
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니, 저는 어떻게 살아야 하나요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: If the next child meets the same fate too….
sentences.ko: 레아: 다음 아이도 같은 운명이라면….
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: I would rather just disappear.
sentences.ko: 레아: 차라리 제가 사라지고 싶어요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Rhea, stand up.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 레아야, 일어나거라.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I will help you. This time, let's do it differently.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내가 너를 돕겠다. 이번엔 다르게 가자.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother….
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니….
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Rhea, listen closely.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 레아야, 잘 듣거라.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: This next child alone, let us hide somewhere else.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 다음 아이만은 다른 곳에 숨기자꾸나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Without Cronus knowing — on a far, secluded island.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스 모르게, 아주 깊은 섬에.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother… can that really be done?
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니… 정말 그게 가능할까요?
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: If a mother and a grandmother work together, it can be done.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어미와 할미가 함께라면 가능하단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, my heart is beating again.
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니, 제 가슴이 다시 뛰어요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Wrap this stone gently in a swaddling cloth.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 강보에 이 돌을 곱게 싸렴.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: And then hand it to Cronus.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 그리고 크로노스에게 건네는 거란다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A stone in place of the baby….
sentences.ko: 레아: 돌을 아기 대신….
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Can we really save our baby that way?
sentences.ko: 레아: 그렇게 해서 우리 아기를 살릴 수 있나요?
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: He can be saved. It's in a mother's hands.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 살릴 수 있단다. 어미의 손에 달렸어.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I understand, Mother. I'll do as you say.
sentences.ko: 레아: 알겠어요, 어머니. 그렇게 할게요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: This time it will surely be different.
sentences.ko: 레아: 이번엔 반드시 다를 거예요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: At least my last baby will grow up in my own arms.
sentences.ko: 레아: 제 마지막 아기만은 제 품에서 자라게 하겠어요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Yes, that resolve is enough.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 그래, 그 마음이면 충분하단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A mother's love conquers any fate.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어머니의 사랑은 어떤 운명도 이긴단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, thank you. Truly, thank you.
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니, 고마워요. 정말 고마워요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: I must carve this scene deep into the record.
sentences.ko: 펜: 이 장면은 깊이 새겨두어야겠다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The day five children fell into a magical sleep.
sentences.ko: 펜: 다섯 아이가 마법의 잠에 빠진 날.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: And the day a mother chose to stand against fate.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그리고 한 어머니가 운명에 맞서기로 한 날.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Pen, can they really wake up?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 정말 깨어날 수 있어요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: I promise. When the time comes, without fail.
sentences.ko: 펜: 약속하마. 때가 오면 반드시.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: They're newborn babies… how could such a thing happen?
sentences.ko: 하라: 갓 태어난 아기인데… 어떻게 그런 일이 일어나죠.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: How hard it must have been for a mother who went through the same thing five times.
sentences.ko: 하라: 다섯 번이나 같은 일을 겪은 어머니는 얼마나 힘들었을까요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: They're only asleep, Hara. They haven't vanished.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잠든 거란다, 하라야. 사라진 게 아니야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The day they wake will surely come. I promise.
sentences.ko: 펜: 깨어날 날이 반드시 온단다. 약속하마.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: On our next journey, let's go and see that day.
sentences.ko: 이리: 다음 여행에서 우리가 그 날을 만나러 가자.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Yeah… I really want to go and see it.
sentences.ko: 하라: 응… 꼭 만나러 갈래요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Rhea, this child is the last chance heaven has given us.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 레아야, 이번 아이는 하늘이 우리에게 마지막으로 준 기회야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother… it's as if the little heart inside me keeps calling out to me.
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니… 배 속에서 작은 심장이 자꾸 저를 부르는 것 같아요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: So this time, let us go where no one will know — without leaving even a footprint.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 그러니 이번엔 아무도 모르게, 발자국조차 남기지 말고 가자.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Yes, Mother. I won't let this child be taken from my arms.
sentences.ko: 레아: 네, 어머니. 이 아이만은 제 품에서 빼앗기지 않을 거예요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: That's the face of a mother who's made up her mind…
sentences.ko: 하라: 어머니가 결심하신 표정이야…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The real myth begins now. Watch closely.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화는 지금부터가 진짜야. 잘 봐 두렴.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: As the birth drew near, Rhea hushed her footsteps and set out for the island of Crete.
sentences.ko: 출산이 가까워 오자, 레아는 발소리를 죽이고 크레타섬으로 떠났다.

sentences.text: Husband, I'm sorry. Just this once, I'm going with a mother's heart.
sentences.ko: 레아: 여보, 미안해요. 이번만은 제가 어머니의 마음으로 갈게요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: The sea will enfold you. Do not be afraid.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 바다가 너를 감싸 줄 거다. 두려워 말렴.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Whoa… the starlight is lighting up the path.
sentences.ko: 이리: 와아… 별빛이 길을 비춰 주고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Won't she be afraid, going all alone…
sentences.ko: 하라: 어머니 혼자 가시는데 무섭지 않을까…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Mother Gaia is going with her, like a shadow.
sentences.ko: 펜: 가이아 어머니가 그림자처럼 함께 가고 계신단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Crete, the secret land Gaia had chosen. Here, even the wind and the waves held their breath.
sentences.ko: 크레타섬, 가이아가 점지한 비밀의 땅. 바람도, 파도도 이곳에선 숨을 죽였다.

sentences.text: Whoa… even the air here is sweet.
sentences.ko: 이리: 우와… 여긴 공기마저 달콤해.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The olive leaves are glinting silver… it's truly magical.
sentences.ko: 하라: 올리브 나무 잎이 은빛으로 반짝여… 정말 신비로워.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: It's a place Mother Gaia has held in her heart for a very long time.
sentences.ko: 펜: 가이아 어머니께서 오래전부터 마음에 품어 두신 자리란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: My baby… you're alive. You're warm.
sentences.ko: 레아: 아가… 살아 있구나. 따뜻하구나.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Mommy promises. I will never send you into the darkness.
sentences.ko: 레아: 엄마가 약속할게. 너는 절대로 어둠 속으로 보내지 않을 거야.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: There's light floating around the baby… like stars.
sentences.ko: 하라: 아기 둘레에 빛이 떠 있어… 별처럼.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That is the very light of the prophesied hero.
sentences.ko: 펜: 저것이 바로 예언된 영웅의 빛이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The baby's fingers are this tiny… and he's going to open a new age?
sentences.ko: 이리: 아기 손가락이 이렇게 작은데… 새 시대를 연다고?
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Husband, this stone is the last lie I will ever tell you.
sentences.ko: 레아: 여보, 이 돌이 제가 드리는 마지막 거짓이에요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: The path you taught me, Mother… I will walk it to the very end.
sentences.ko: 레아: 어머니가 가르쳐 주신 길… 제가 끝까지 걸어갈게요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Her hands are trembling as she wraps the stone in the swaddling cloth…
sentences.ko: 하라: 돌을 강보에 싸시는 손이 떨리고 있어…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: She's afraid, and yet she never stops for a moment.
sentences.ko: 이리: 무서워하면서도, 절대 멈추질 않으셔.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: This is a mother's clever plan. It's the moment love becomes the greatest courage.
sentences.ko: 펜: 이것이 어머니의 책략이란다. 사랑이 가장 큰 용기가 되는 순간이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Husband… here is this child. Please take him.
sentences.ko: 레아: 여보… 이번 아이예요. 받아 주세요.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Why do your eyes shine so? You ought to be grieving.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어찌 너의 눈이 그리 빛나느냐. 슬퍼야 마땅하거늘.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: My sorrow is so deep that even my tears have dried up.
sentences.ko: 레아: 슬픔이 너무 깊어 눈물도 말랐답니다.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: I think she'll get caught… my heart is pounding hard.
sentences.ko: 하라: 들킬 것 같아… 심장이 쿵쿵 뛰어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Please hold on just a little longer…
sentences.ko: 이리: 어머니, 조금만 더 견뎌요…
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: A mother's acting is a mask that love itself created.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어머니의 연기는 사랑이 만들어 낸 가면이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The dark promise knelt before a mother's clever plan.
sentences.ko: 어두운 약속이, 어머니의 책략 앞에 무릎을 꿇었다.

sentences.text: Sleep. Sleep and never wake.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 잠들거라. 영원히 깨지 말거라.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Another one… I've put to sleep with my own hands.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 또 한 명을… 내 손으로 잠재웠다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: He was fooled… he was really fooled!
sentences.ko: 하라: 속았어… 정말로 속았어!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: To think he mistook a stone for a baby!
sentences.ko: 이리: 돌멩이를 아기인 줄 알다니!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Not even the magic of the golden sickle could pierce a mother's love.
sentences.ko: 펜: 황금 낫의 마법조차 어머니의 사랑은 꿰뚫지 못했단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: This child will become the light that opens a new age.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 이 아이가, 새 시대를 여는 빛이 될 것이다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mountain nymphs, raise this child in your arms.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 산 님프들아, 너희 품에서 이 아이를 길러 주렴.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, we'll lull him to sleep with songs and raise him on honey.
sentences.ko: 님프: 어머니, 저희가 노래로 재우고 꿀로 키울게요.
sentences.speaker: Nymph

sentences.text: The baby is smiling… as if he already knows everything.
sentences.ko: 하라: 아기가 웃고 있어… 마치 다 알고 있다는 듯이.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The deeper the cave, the safer it is. Light grows stronger within it.
sentences.ko: 펜: 동굴은 깊을수록 안전하단다. 빛은 그 안에서 더 단단해지지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: A newborn hero has hidden away in the depths for a while. Soon he'll wake and shake the heavens.
sentences.ko: 펜: 갓난 영웅이, 잠시 깊은 곳에 숨었어. 곧 깨어나 하늘을 흔들 거야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Then we'd better get ready for a new adventure too!
sentences.ko: 이리: 그럼 우리도 새 모험 준비해야겠네!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The promise was broken, but love won in the end.
sentences.ko: 하라: 약속은 깨졌지만, 사랑이 끝내 이겼어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: A mother's clever plan is the kindest lie myth ever left behind.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어머니의 책략은 신화가 남긴 가장 다정한 거짓이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: That lie saved one child, and saved an entire age.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그 거짓이 한 아이를 살리고, 한 시대를 살린 거구나.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Whenever a chapter of the myth is written, the gold of Gimje regains its light.
sentences.ko: 신화의 한 장이 기록되면, 김제의 황금도 제 빛을 되찾는다.

sentences.text: The golden grains… have turned back to gold again!
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 곡식알이… 다시 황금빛으로 돌아왔어요!
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: See there, looks like our Hara made the trip just fine.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 거 봐, 우리 하라가 잘 다녀온 모양이여.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: When the newborn Zeus grows up, what kind of man will he become?
sentences.ko: 하라: 갓난 제우스가 자라면, 어떤 어른이 될까?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes. That day will come soon. We'll meet again.
sentences.ko: 펜: 응. 곧 그날이 와. 우리, 다시 만날 거야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: By then it'll be an even bigger adventure! Get ready in advance!
sentences.ko: 이리: 그땐 더 큰 모험이야! 미리 준비해 둬!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: It's a new morning… I think I can take another step.
sentences.ko: 하라: 새 아침이다… 또 한 걸음, 갈 수 있겠어.
sentences.speaker: Hara
